message:
🐛 Blur untriaged request title in both Your Requests and Contributions (#1637)

The title of user-submitted bug reports and feature requests was visible
in plain text before triage — both in the Your Requests section and in
the GitHub Contributions list. Now blurred with blur-sm select-none in
both locations by cross-referencing contribution issue numbers with
untriaged feedback request numbers.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
